_comment: OCHA brand tokens + format-aware layout templates. Everything visual is driven from here. Swap fonts/logo/colors for the exact OCHA spec once provided. Author content once; the layout engine renders each format from the `formats` block below.

fonts._note: OCHA brand font = Raleway (installed at /Library/Fonts/Raleway/static). name=Bold caps, title=Medium, caption=SemiBold.
fonts.name: /Library/Fonts/Raleway/static/Raleway-Bold.ttf
fonts.title: /Library/Fonts/Raleway/static/Raleway-Medium.ttf
fonts.caption: /Library/Fonts/Raleway/static/Raleway-SemiBold.ttf

logo._note: Official OCHA white vertical lockup. SVG source in assets/OCHA_logo_vertical_white.svg; this PNG is rasterized from it. Re-raster crisply with: brew install librsvg && rsvg-convert -h 480 assets/OCHA_logo_vertical_white.svg -o assets/OCHA_logo_vertical_white.png

_reframe_note: Subtle subject-follow. Detects the face in the 4K source and drifts a punched-in crop to keep the speaker centred, using the 4K headroom (crop is downscaled, never upscaled). zoom = punch-in factor (1.0 = full frame/off; 1.3 = gentle, leaves room to follow ~13% off-centre). smooth_seconds = low-pass window (bigger = slower/calmer). face_v = where the face sits vertically in the crop (0.45 keeps a little headroom). Falls back to a centred crop if no face is found.
_looks_note: Color/lighting grades applied to the FOOTAGE before overlays, to unify clips. `default` is used unless the instruction sets `look`. Values are ffmpeg filter chains; tune toward references/.../assets/example CLEAN.mp4. UI will later expose these as 2-3 picks.
_formats_note: Per-format layout templates. `safe` = platform-UI safe-area insets in px (keep logo/captions/lower-thirds inside). `reframe` = how to fit the source footage into this canvas (center for now; face/subject focal point + manual override land with the layout engine). Element positions are derived from the base tokens above, offset to stay within `safe`. All values are sensible seeds — tune per the OCHA house style.

16:9.notes: Landscape master. Logo top-right full-duration; lower-third bottom-left.

9:16.notes: Reels / Stories / TikTok. Heavy bottom inset clears platform UI; keep captions above it.
